text.tspan: DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act): Deployment readiness assessment (7.1) must validate operational resilience testing outcomes and ICT risk management
controls. Progressive deployment (7.2) implements DORA Article 25 change management requirements. Post-deployment verification (7.3) confirms resilience
baselines meet DORA thresholds before full production activation.

text.tspan: NIST CSF 2.0 (Cybersecurity Framework): Monitoring Activation (7.4) implements NIST CSF Detect function — production monitoring dashboards, alerting rules, and
runbook integration establish continuous detection capabilities. Progressive deployment pattern (7.2) aligns with NIST CSF Respond and Recover functions through
